title: VelocityUtils
description: VelocityUtils is a plugin for Velocity proxy servers that adds essential utilities for both players and server administrators.
body:
![Portada](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/portada2.png?raw=true)

VelocityUtils is a plugin designed for Velocity proxy servers that adds essential utilities for both players and server administrators. It aims to simplify network management with useful, configurable, and easy-to-use features.

![Features](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/features.png?raw=true) [![Dependencies](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/dependencies2.png?raw=true)](https://rexi666-plugins.gitbook.io/rexi666/velocityutils/installation) ![Screenshots](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/screenshots.png?raw=true) [![Commands and Permissions](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/commands%20and%20permissions2.png?raw=true)]([https://rexi666-plugins.gitbook.io/rexi666](https://rexi666-plugins.gitbook.io/rexi666/velocityutils/commands-and-permissions)) | [![Wiki](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/wiki.png?raw=true)](https://rexi666-plugins.gitbook.io/rexi666) | [![Discord](https://github.com/Rexi666/VelocityUtils/blob/main/Wiki/Images/plugin/discord.png?raw=true)](https://discord.com/invite/a3zkKtrjTr) | |---|---|
